description: POC: HLS multi-bitrate ingest and playback using hls.js (streams-test.html).
POC: WebGPU zero-copy video import using importExternalTexture (webgpu-render-test.html).
POC: Basic shader remapping (Mono Crop, Side-by-Side) for stacked 4K streams (webgpu-render-test.html).
Integrate Slang-WASM for runtime shader compilation from Slang to WGSL.
Implement EMA-based static background model and foreground masking in compute shaders.
Implement optical flow estimation to generate synthetic motion vectors for temporal accumulation.
Implement horizontal disparity search for depth extraction from parallel stereo streams.
Implement planar homography warping to align the secondary camera view to the primary view.
Implement 6-layer CNN for high-performance luminance (Y) upscaling in compute shaders.
Implement temporal accumulation logic to blend historical samples via motion vectors.
Implement Reference-Based Super-Resolution (RefSR) utilizing the secondary eye's data.
Implement YUV separation and hardware-accelerated bicubic chroma interpolation.
Optimize pipeline using f16 (half-precision) weights and computations.
